{{基礎情報 公家
| 氏名 = Toyotowake-no-Mikoto
| 画像 =
| 画像サイズ =
| 画像説明 =
| 時代 = {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}
| 生誕 = Unknown
| 死没 = Unknown
| 改名 =
| 別名 = Toyotowake-ō, Toyotowake-no-Miko
| 諡号 =
| 神号 =
| 戒名 =
| 墓所 =
| 官位 = {{ill|Ōita no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|大分国造|lt=Tsukushi-Ōita no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt_ja=筑紫大分国造}}
| 主君 =
| 氏族 = Ancestor of {{ill|Ōita clan|ja|大分氏|lt=Ōita-no-Kimi|lt_ja=大分公}}, {{ill|Hi no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|火国造|lt=Hi-no-Kuni-wake|lt_ja=火国別}}, and others
| 父母 = Father: {{ill|Emperor Keikō|ja|景行天皇}}, Mother: {{ill|Sotakehime|ja|襲武媛}}
| 兄弟 = {{ill|Nunoshi-hime-no-Mikoto|ja|渟熨斗姫命|lt=Numashiro-no-Iratsume|lt_ja=沼代郎女}}?
| 妻   =
| 子   =
| 特記事項 = Enshrined deity of {{ill|Ōita Shrine|ja|大分社}}
}}
'''Toyotowake-no-Mikoto''' (''toyotowake-no-mikoto''; {{ill|dates of birth and death unknown|ja|生没年不詳|lt=dates of birth and death unknown|lt_ja=生没年不詳}}) was a {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} {{ill|gōzoku|ja|豪族}} and one of the '''{{ill|Ōita no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|大分国造}}'''.

== Overview ==
In the ''{{ill|Kojiki|ja|古事記}}'' he is written as '''Toyotowake-ō''', in the ''{{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}}'' as '''Toyotowake-no-Miko''', and in the ''{{ill|Sendai Kuji Hongi|ja|先代旧事本紀}}'' as '''Toyotowake-no-Mikoto'''.

In the ''Kiki'' and the ''Sendai Kuji Hongi'', {{ill|Emperor Keikō|ja|景行天皇}} is recorded as his father. The ''Kojiki'' simply records him as the son of a concubine, and the ''Sendai Kuji Hongi'' counts him among the illegitimate sons without naming his mother; however, the ''Nihon Shoki'' gives his mother as {{ill|Sotakehime|ja|襲武媛}}.

Toyotowake-no-Mikoto, recorded in the ''Nihon Shoki'' as the ancestor of the Hi-no-Kuni-wake, is thought to be related to Toyotoirihiko-no-Mikoto — who is recorded in the ''Sendai Kuji Hongi'' as the ancestor of the Hi-no-Kuni-wake{{efn|Generally recorded as the ancestor of Ōtawake.}} — as well as to {{ill|Taka-kuni-kori-wake-no-Miko|ja|武国凝別皇子}} (ancestor of Tsukushi-Mizuma-no-Kimi and Iyo-no-Kuni-Mimura-wake) and Kunise-wake-no-Mikoto (ancestor of Mizuma-no-Kimi)<ref name="houga">{{ill|Hōga Toshio|ja|宝賀寿男}}, "6. Early Branching of the Okinaga Common-Ancestor Side Lineages," ''Kodai Shizoku no Kenkyū 6: Okinaga-shi — The Smith Clan That Produced Great Kings'', Aogaki Shuppan, 2014, pp. 127-128.</ref>.

He is enshrined alongside {{ill|Ōita-no-Wakaomi|ja|大分稚臣}} at {{ill|Ōita Shrine|ja|大分社}} in Haneda, {{ill|Ōita, Ōita|ja|大分市|lt=Ōita City|lt_ja=大分市}}.

== Descendants ==
*{{ill|Ōita clan|ja|大分氏|lt=Ōita-no-Kimi|lt_ja=大分公}} — Kin of the {{ill|Ōita no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|大分国造}}.
*{{ill|Tsurumi clan|ja|鶴見氏|lt=Tsurumi-no-Kimi|lt_ja=鶴見公}} — Descendants of the Ōita no Kuni no Miyatsuko.
*{{ill|Nurushima clan|ja|漆島氏|lt=Nurushima-no-Kimi|lt_ja=奴留島公}} — Descendants of the Ōita no Kuni no Miyatsuko.
*{{ill|Mitsushima-Mizuma-no-Kimi|ja|水間氏|lt=Mitsushima-Mizuma-no-Kimi|lt_ja=三嶋水間君}}
*{{ill|Iochi-no-Obito|ja|庵智氏|lt=Iochi-no-Obito|lt_ja=庵智首}}
*{{ill|Sōshi-no-Obito|ja|壮子氏|lt=Sōshi-no-Obito|lt_ja=壮子首}}
*{{ill|Awa-no-Obito|ja|粟氏|lt=Awa-no-Obito|lt_ja=粟首}}
*{{ill|Tsukushi-Hi-wake-no-Kimi|ja|火国造|lt=Tsukushi-Hi-wake-no-Kimi|lt_ja=筑紫火別君}} — Kin of the {{ill|Hi no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|火国造}}.

== Footnotes ==
{{Notelist}}
{{Reflist}}

== See also ==
*{{ill|Kuni no miyatsuko|ja|国造}}
*{{ill|List of Figures from before the Asuka Period|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧}}

{{デフォルトソート:とよとわけのみこと}}
[[Category:古墳時代の人物]]
[[Category:古代日本の人物]]
[[Category:豊後国の人物]]
[[Category:景行天皇の子女|伝とよとわけのみこと]]
[[Category:大分県の歴史]]
[[Category:生没年不詳]]
[[Category:Kuni no miyatsuko]]
[[ja:豊門別命]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
